name: upload_object
description: Upload an object to an R2 bucket. R2 is S3-compatible, so you can use S3 PutObject via the S3-compatible endpoint. Alternatively, use the Cloudflare API to upload via a presigned URL or Workers. The S3-compatible endpoint is the recommended approach for direct uploads.

parameters.name: bucket_name
parameters.description: The name of the R2 bucket to upload to. This is part of the S3-compatible URL path.

parameters.name: object_key
parameters.description: The key (path) for the object within the bucket (e.g., 'images/logo.png').

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: The MIME type of the object being uploaded.

parameters.name: Content-Length
parameters.description: The size of the object in bytes.

body._note: On success, the response body is empty. Metadata is in the response headers.
